channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Adapting Under Fire: Ukraine’s Race to Reinvent Modern Defense
item.description: CSIS hosted active-duty Ukrainian air defense personnel to discuss how Ukraine’s military has adapted across three interconnected fronts: air defense, training, and technological development.

item.title: CSIS Australia Chair Names Anna Fifield Non-Resident Fellow
item.description: The Center for Strategic and International Studies today announced that Anna Fifield has been appointed as a non-resident fellow with the CSIS Australia Chair.
